title: MoveRays Hand Grip Strengthener, Forearm, Fingers Exerciser - Silicone Rings for Muscle Training, Sports, Rock Climbing, Fitness
features: Ergonomic design with pure silicone, 70 mm/2.75” diameter easily fits in your hands, 3 resistance levels 30, 40, 50 lb; 1.77 oz/50 g each; non-toxic, no click or squeaking noise, no sharp edges
Good grip on everything is natural when hand strength is built overtime with micro hand movements throughout the day, while in an online meeting/training, studying or watching your child play sports
Stronger hand grip muscles for sports like baseball, tennis, golf; powerful fingers for hobbies like rock climbing, playing music instruments; ideal for men, women, teens, adults and seniors
Easy to use, squeeze, hold, release and repeat in your palm, thumb and all fingers, insert a finger of both hands and gently pull outwards; easy to clean, carry in a bag or pocket anywhere, anytime
Satisfaction is guaranteed; we aim to deliver high quality, durable products to our customers and outstanding customer service
description: Product Description Train Anywhere, Anytime MoveRays Grip Strengtheners (30, 40, 50 lbs) suit all skill levels—an ideal gift for fitness enthusiasts, athletes, or anyone building grip strength. Adjustable – Three levels for progress. Versatile – Ideal for various grip training needs. Travel-friendly – Train anywhere. Durable Design for Everyday Use Crafted for consistent performance in any setting. Made from high-quality, skin-friendly silicone, MoveRays Grip Strengtheners are sturdy, ergonomic, and built to withstand daily use. The smooth, soft surface ensures a pleasant feel during workouts, with no sharp edges or breakable parts. Ideal for all ages and fitness levels, these grip trainers are designed for long-lasting performance and offer a secure, enjoyable training experience. Built to Last – High-quality, skin-friendly silicone ensures durability and lasting resistance. Ergonomic Grip – Smooth, soft surface for a secure hold with no sharp edges. For All Ages – Well-crafted design supports strength, dexterity, and hand wellness. Finger Stretches Refine dexterity with outward resistance. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners build balance and control with three resistance levels. Basic Squeeze A quick squeeze activates key muscles. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners offer three levels for progress—space-saving, robust, and easy to use anywhere. Reverse Grip Squeeze Strength is balance. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners target opposing muscles for grip stability, dexterity, and endurance with three resistance levels. Static Hold Build endurance with static holds. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners boost power for sports, lifting, and daily tasks. Compact, tough, and portable. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners reinforce grip training, hand movement, and muscle conditioning. Designed for wrist engagement and endurance, they offer a dynamic way to activate key muscles. Whether for climbing, arm wrestling, or office use, these handy trainers fit seamlessly into any routine. Stronger forearms mean lasting endurance for every challenge! MoveRays Grip Strengtheners build grip strength for wakesurfing, dodgeball, rock climbing, and many more sports & activities. With progressive resistance levels, they refine hand control for arm wrestling, CrossFit, or guitar practice. Train anywhere—at home, the gym, or on your next adventure. Develop hand strength, loosen tightness, and revitalize your grip with each squeeze. MoveRays Grip Strengtheners provide a simple yet powerful way to engage your hands. These versatile trainers refine dexterity for rock climbing, pickleball, or guitar practice while keeping hands active and relaxed.
